message:
feat(demo_showcase): Add resize handling and palette action support

- Add `App::handle_resize()` method for terminal resize events
- Handle `Event::Resize` in render loop: call renderer.resize() and update app
- Reset overlay scroll positions on resize to prevent out-of-bounds state
- Push toast notification with new dimensions on resize
- Add Palette* Action variants for command palette navigation
- Handle PaletteUp/Down/Execute/Backspace/Char in apply_action()
- Fix CellContent::Empty and GraphemeId Display formatting issues
- Clean up clippy warnings (format_push_string, cast_possible_truncation)

Refs: bd-ix0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
